attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
TVOUTPUT.BATCH_ID,
TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION,
TVOUTPUT.ADJUSTMENT_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
CAST(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE AS DATE) as START_DATE_ACTIVE, 
COALESCE(MAX (TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,	
TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	  ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 
	FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') as END_DATE_ACTIVE,
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.EXCEPTION_TYPE,
ROW_NUMBER () 
OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE, TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
	ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC) as RANK_INDEX, 
(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NAATT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE IS NOT NULL AND NAATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY IS NOT NULL 
	AND NAATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 'U'ELSE 'I' END) as DML_TYPE, 
TVOUTPUT.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
'ARADJ' EP_SOURCE_APPLICATION_CODE
FROM
(
	SELECT 
	BATCH_ID,
	BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,
	BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION,
	ADJUSTMENT_NAME,
	SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
	START_TV_DATE,
	CREATE_DATETIME,
	ACTION_CODE,
	EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	SS_CODE,
	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,  BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION,
	ADJUSTMENT_NAME, BK_COMPANY_CODE ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM 
	FROM 
	(
	SELECT 
	SOARTA.BATCH_ID,
	SOARTA.NAME BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,
	EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	SOARTA.DESCRIPTION ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION,
	SOARTA.NAME ADJUSTMENT_NAME,
	SOARTA.RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
	CAST ( SOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
	SOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME,
	SOARTA.ACTION_CODE, 
	'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
	FROM 
	$$STGDB.ST_OM_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL SOARTA,
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
	$$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	WHERE 
	SOARTA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME
	UNION ALL/*NEW CDC QUERY STARTED*/
		SELECT 
	SOARTA.BATCH_ID,
	SOARTA.NAME BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,
	EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	SOARTA.DESCRIPTION ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION,
	SOARTA.NAME ADJUSTMENT_NAME,
	SOARTA.RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
	CAST ( SOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
	SOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME,
	SOARTA.ACTION_CODE, 
	'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
	FROM 
	$$STGDB.ST_CG_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL SOARTA,
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
	$$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	WHERE 
	SOARTA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND SOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC'
/*---------CDC QUERY END.....*/
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	EOARTA.BATCH_ID,
	EOARTA.NAME BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,
	EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	EOARTA.DESCRIPTION ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION,
	EOARTA.NAME ADJUSTMENT_NAME,
	EOARTA.RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
	CAST (EOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
	EOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME,
	EOARTA.ACTION_CODE, 
	'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
	FROM 
	$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL EOARTA,
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
	$$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	WHERE
	EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT=EOARTA.ORG_ID
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= EOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND EOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC'
/*--- CDC Exception Query ---*/
UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	EOARTA.BATCH_ID,
	EOARTA.NAME BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,
	EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	EOARTA.DESCRIPTION ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION,
	EOARTA.NAME ADJUSTMENT_NAME,
	EOARTA.RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
	CAST (EOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
	EOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME,
	EOARTA.ACTION_CODE, 
	'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
	FROM 
    $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL EOARTA,
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
	$$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	WHERE
	EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT=EOARTA.ORG_ID
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= EOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME
/*-- End CDC Exception Query -- */
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	-999 BATCH_ID,
	NAATT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,
	NAATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	NAATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	NAATT.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
	NAATT.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_NAME,
	NAATT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
	NAATT.START_TV_DATE,
	NAATT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
	'X' ACTION_CODE, 
	'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	NAATT.SS_CODE
	FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_TV NAATT
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON ( NAATT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	WHERE NAATT.END_TV_DATE= CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
	AND NAATT.SS_CODE='CDC'
	AND (NAATT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE, NAATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,NAATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE) IN 
	 (SELECT ST.NAME, EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE FROM
	 (SELECT ORG_ID,NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL
	  UNION
	  SELECT ORG_ID,NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL WHERE GLOBAL_NAME='CDC'
	  UNION
	  SELECT ORG_ID,NAME FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
	  UNION
	  SELECT ORG_ID,NAME FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'  AND GLOBAL_NAME='CDC'
	  )ST INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	  ON ST.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT )
   ) TVINPUT 
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,TVINPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,   TVINPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE, TVINPUT.START_TV_DATE ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
)TVOUTPUT 
LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_TV NAATT
ON TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE=NAATT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE
AND TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=NAATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE=NAATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAATT.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1
AND NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_TV 
WHERE SS_CODE='CG' 
AND TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE=BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE
AND TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE=BK_COMPANY_CODE
)

SELECT 
SOARTA.BATCH_ID, 
SOARTA.ACCOUNTING_AFFECT_FLAG, 
SOARTA.ASSET_TAX_CODE, SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE1, 
SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE10, SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE11, 
SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE12, SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE13, SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE14, 
SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE15, SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE2, SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE3, 
SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE4, SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE5, SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE6, 
SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE7, SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE8, SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE9, 
SOARTA.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, SOARTA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID, 
SOARTA.CREATED_BY, SOARTA.CREATION_DATE, 
SOARTA.DEFAULT_ACCTG_DISTRIBUTION_SET, 
SOARTA.DESCRIPTION, SOARTA.END_DATE_ACTIVE, 
SOARTA.GES_PK_ID , 
SOARTA.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3, 
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8, 
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, 
SOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME,
SOARTA.GL_ACCOUNT_SOURCE,
SOARTA.INACTIVE_DATE, 
SOARTA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SOARTA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SOARTA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
SOARTA.LIABILITY_TAX_CODE, 
SOARTA.NAME, SOARTA.ORG_ID,
SOARTA.RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID, 
SOARTA.RISK_ELIMINATION_DAYS,
SOARTA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
SOARTA.START_DATE_ACTIVE,
SOARTA.STATUS,
SOARTA.TAX_CODE_SOURCE, 
SOARTA.TAX_RECOVERABLE_FLAG, 
SOARTA.TYPE_CODE,SOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME, 
SOARTA.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OM_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL SOARTA
WHERE (NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME)
	OR NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	WHERE SOARTA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT))

SELECT 
TVOUTPUT.BATCH_ID,
TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION,
TVOUTPUT.ADJUSTMENT_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
CAST(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE AS DATE) as START_DATE_ACTIVE, 
COALESCE(MAX (TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,	
TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	  ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 
	FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') as END_DATE_ACTIVE,
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.EXCEPTION_TYPE,
ROW_NUMBER () 
OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE, TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
	ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC) as RANK_INDEX, 
(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NAATT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE IS NOT NULL AND NAATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY IS NOT NULL 
	AND NAATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 'U'ELSE 'I' END) as DML_TYPE, 
TVOUTPUT.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
'ARADJ' EP_SOURCE_APPLICATION_CODE
FROM
(
	SELECT 
	BATCH_ID,
	BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,
	BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION,
	ADJUSTMENT_NAME,
	SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
	START_TV_DATE,
	CREATE_DATETIME,
	ACTION_CODE,
	EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	SS_CODE,
	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,  BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION,
	ADJUSTMENT_NAME, BK_COMPANY_CODE ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM 
	FROM 
	(
	SELECT 
	SOARTA.BATCH_ID,
	SOARTA.NAME BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,
	EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	SOARTA.DESCRIPTION ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION,
	SOARTA.NAME ADJUSTMENT_NAME,
	SOARTA.RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
	CAST ( SOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
	SOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME,
	SOARTA.ACTION_CODE, 
	'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
	FROM 
	$$STGDB.ST_OM_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL SOARTA,
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
	$$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	WHERE 
	SOARTA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME
	UNION ALL/*NEW CG QUERY STARTED*/
		SELECT 
	SOARTA.BATCH_ID,
	SOARTA.NAME BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,
	EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	SOARTA.DESCRIPTION ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION,
	SOARTA.NAME ADJUSTMENT_NAME,
	SOARTA.RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
	CAST ( SOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
	SOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME,
	SOARTA.ACTION_CODE, 
	'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
	FROM 
	$$STGDB.ST_CG_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL SOARTA,
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
	$$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	WHERE 
	SOARTA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND SOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG'
/*---------CG QUERY END.....*/
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	EOARTA.BATCH_ID,
	EOARTA.NAME BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,
	EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	EOARTA.DESCRIPTION ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION,
	EOARTA.NAME ADJUSTMENT_NAME,
	EOARTA.RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
	CAST (EOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
	EOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME,
	EOARTA.ACTION_CODE, 
	'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
	FROM 
	$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL EOARTA,
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
	$$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	WHERE
	EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT=EOARTA.ORG_ID
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= EOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND EOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG'
/*--- CG Exception Query ---*/
UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	EOARTA.BATCH_ID,
	EOARTA.NAME BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,
	EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	EOARTA.DESCRIPTION ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION,
	EOARTA.NAME ADJUSTMENT_NAME,
	EOARTA.RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
	CAST (EOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
	EOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME,
	EOARTA.ACTION_CODE, 
	'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
	FROM 
    $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL EOARTA,
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
	$$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	WHERE
	EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT=EOARTA.ORG_ID
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= EOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME
/*-- End CG Exception Query -- */
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	-999 BATCH_ID,
	NAATT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,
	NAATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	NAATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	NAATT.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
	NAATT.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_NAME,
	NAATT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
	NAATT.START_TV_DATE,
	NAATT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
	'X' ACTION_CODE, 
	'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	NAATT.SS_CODE
	FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_TV NAATT
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON ( NAATT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	WHERE NAATT.END_TV_DATE= CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
	AND NAATT.SS_CODE='CG'
	/*AND (NAATT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT, NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)	IN */
	AND (NAATT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE, NAATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,NAATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE) IN 
	 (SELECT ST.NAME, EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE FROM
	 (SELECT ORG_ID,NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL
	  UNION
	  SELECT ORG_ID,NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL WHERE GLOBAL_NAME='CG'
	  UNION
	  SELECT ORG_ID,NAME FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
	  UNION
	  SELECT ORG_ID,NAME FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'  AND GLOBAL_NAME='CG'
	  )ST INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	  ON ST.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT )
   ) TVINPUT 
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE,TVINPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,   TVINPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE, TVINPUT.START_TV_DATE ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
)TVOUTPUT 
LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_TV NAATT
ON TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE=NAATT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE
AND TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=NAATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE=NAATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAATT.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1
AND NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_TV 
WHERE SS_CODE='CDC' 
AND TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE=BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE
AND TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE=BK_COMPANY_CODE
)

SELECT 
SOARTA.BATCH_ID, 
SOARTA.RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID, 
SOARTA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,

SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13, 
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19, 
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20,
SOARTA.ASSET_TAX_CODE,
SOARTA.LIABILITY_TAX_CODE,
SOARTA.GL_ACCOUNT_SOURCE,
SOARTA.TAX_CODE_SOURCE,

SOARTA.ACCOUNTING_AFFECT_FLAG, 
SOARTA.RISK_ELIMINATION_DAYS,
SOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME,
SOARTA.CREATE_DATETIME, 
SOARTA.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG_AR_RECEIVABLE_TRX_ALL SOARTA
WHERE (NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SOARTA.GLOBAL_NAME)
	OR NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	WHERE SOARTA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT))
